title: Avoid hardcoded AWS region strings
description: Hardcoding AWS region strings in your code can lead to deployment issues and reduce flexibility. Use configuration or environment variables to set the region dynamically and ensure your application is portable and maintainable.
recommendation: Refactor code to retrieve the AWS region from configuration or environment variables instead of hardcoding it.

checks.message: Refactor code to retrieve the AWS region from configuration or environment variables instead of hardcoding it.
